hero.subtitle: I'm a Software Developer Engineer In Test from Bangalore, India.

about.title: About Me.
about.description:
I'm a developer who genuinely loves the craft of coding. My journey in the tech world began in 2020, and since then, I've been fascinated by the endless possibilities of building software that works and scales.

When I'm not writing code or building automation frameworks, you'll likely find me out and about with my camera. I have a deep passion for photography—capturing the world through my lens is how I find balance and inspiration. Scroll down to see some of my favorite moments.

projects.header_desc: Below are detailed case studies on my major frameworks and achievements.

list.title: AI-Driven Framework.
list.desc1: A Hybrid Automation Framework with AI-Based Validation
list.desc2: Designed and developed a hybrid framework (Selenium + Playwright) with AI-driven visual validation, reducing execution time by 20% and improving test reliability.

list.title: Centralized Playwright.
list.desc1: Unified UI + API Automation with Network Monitoring
list.desc2: Built a centralized Playwright framework with real-time API tracking during UI tests, improving visibility into frontend-backend interactions.

list.title: Optimization Engine.
list.desc2: Implemented an automated rerun mechanism for failed and skipped tests, significantly improving CI/CD pipeline efficiency.

list.title: Debugging System.
list.desc2: Developed an AI-based system to convert analytics events into user interaction stories, helping teams debug faster and understand real user behavior.

list.title: Alert Framework.
list.desc2: Built an alerting system using Java Mail API to notify stakeholders about execution anomalies and failures in real-time.

work_page.header_desc: With more than 5 years of experience as a Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET), I specialize in building robust CI/CD pipelines, hybrid automation frameworks for Web, mWeb, and API ecosystems, and harnessing Agentic AI to optimize testing environments. Below is a detailed overview of my career.

list.title: Makemytrip (redBus).
list.desc2:
• Led the design and development of Hybrid Automation frameworks (Selenium+Playwrite) for the web and Mweb application.
  • Integrated AI-driven visual validation for UI testing, leveraging prompt-based validation to reduce manual logic implementation, accelerate execution, and enhance test reliability, this reduces the execution time by 20%.
  • Implemented automated rerun mechanism for failed and skipped test cases, significantly reducing execution time and improving pipeline efficiency.
  • Managed and delivered user stories across multiple geographies for web applications, ensuring timely releases and alignment with business requirements.
  • Integrated a mailer service within CI/CD pipelines to deliver execution status reports upon job completion and configured automated alert notifications when failed/skipped test cases exceeded defined thresholds.
  • Developed an AI-based framework to process Google Analytics events, automatically generating interaction stories for faster RCA.

list.title: InfoEdge (Naukri.com).
list.desc2:
• Led the design and development of multiple automation frameworks across projects using Selenium, Cucumber, Playwright, Java, TestNG, Maven, and POM.
  • Designed and implemented API automation framework with Rest Assured for validating backend APIs across both Production and Test environments.
  • Monitored and maintained automation suites in live environments, ensuring stability through daily execution and script maintenance.
  • Configured and optimized CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins, managing jobs, handling pull requests, and performing code reviews.
  • Developed a centralized Playwright framework with integrated network monitoring of APIs during UI automation.
  • Contributed to the creation of an Alert Monitoring Framework using Java and Java Mail API.
  • Actively participated in grooming sessions with Product Owners to refine requirements and ensure test coverage.
  • Experienced in test planning, case design, script development, and aligned with project-specific test strategies.
  • Investigated live Aura logs for monitoring, raised bugs with detailed analysis, and collaborated with developers for root cause analysis.

list.title: Cognizant.
list.desc2:
• Designed and Developed Framework for One of the Leading Insurance Companies in the USA.
  • Creation of end-to-end testing test cases and automating them.
  • Maintaining automation script and keep updating for new feature releases.
  • Validating and Testing Database testing.
  • Collaborated closely with engineers and business stakeholders across the development and testing life cycle.
  • Experience in Agile development environment using CI/CD tools like Jenkins.
  • Hands-on experience in testing Web applications.
  • Updated Daily Status and Weekly Status Reports for stakeholders.

Senior SDET — InfoEdge (Naukri.com), Noida

Programmer Analyst — Cognizant, Kolkata

skills.title: Core Expertise.
skills.description:
Automation Architecture
Designing scalable, maintainable automation frameworks for complex systems.

API & Backend Testing
Deep validation of APIs, payloads, and system integrations.

AI in Testing
Leveraging AI for visual validation, analytics processing, and intelligent debugging.

Debugging & RCA

Performance Optimization
Reducing execution time and improving pipeline efficiency.

CI/CD & DevOps

statement.title: My Vision.
statement.description:
I build systems that don’t just test software — they improve it.
My focus is on scalability, reliability, and intelligent automation that delivers real impact.

footer.text: Building intelligent automation. Breaking complexity. Shipping confidence.
